title: Unwrap BTC - Open App
meta_description: unwrap btc through the official WBTC destination, verify the Ethereum token contract, and follow a redemption route back to native Bitcoin.
hero_h2: Move wrapped bitcoin back to native Bitcoin
hero_lead: unwrap btc is the direct route for holders who want to move WBTC exposure off Ethereum and back toward native Bitcoin using the official WBTC destination and verified token details.
what_is: WBTC is the Ethereum ERC-20 representation of Bitcoin used across wallets and DeFi. Verify the live token identity on Etherscan before using any route.

how.d: Use the WBTC domain or a supported provider route instead of search ads, clones, or unsolicited links.
Confirm WBTC on Ethereum and the contract address 0x2260fac5e5542a773aa44fbcfedf7c193bc2c599 before connecting a wallet.
WBTC redemption generally relies on merchants, custodians, or venues that support moving from WBTC back to native Bitcoin.
Review network fees, provider terms, KYC requirements, timing, and the destination Bitcoin address before approving anything.

points.p: The official WBTC contract is public on Ethereum, so contract verification should happen before any approval or transfer.
WBTC minting and burning are described in the official whitepaper as merchant and custodian processes, not a generic wallet-only swap.
A legitimate flow should point to known WBTC resources, show the exact asset, and avoid asking for broad token approvals without a clear reason.

faq.a: It usually means moving from a wrapped Bitcoin token such as WBTC on Ethereum back toward native BTC on the Bitcoin network.

faq.q: Is unwrap btc handled by the WBTC contract directly?
faq.a: For ordinary users, redemption is usually handled through supported merchants, custodians, exchanges, or other providers; the WBTC contract records token activity on Ethereum.

faq.q: Which token should I verify before I unwrap btc?
faq.a: Verify WBTC on Ethereum at contract address 0x2260fac5e5542a773aa44fbcfedf7c193bc2c599 and cross-check it on Etherscan.

faq.q: Does unwrap btc have fixed fees?
faq.a: No universal fee should be assumed; costs can include Ethereum gas, Bitcoin network fees, provider fees, and any terms set by the route you use.

faq.q: Is this unwrap btc page the official WBTC app?
faq.a: No. Use it as a navigation and verification page, then confirm the destination domain and token details before connecting a wallet.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify wbtc.network and the token contract before connecting. Educational only, not financial advice.
